inputs.value: [{"value1":"str(失效时间)","rules":"==","value2":"'null'","pipe":0},{"value1":"str(失效时间)","rules":"==","value2":"''","pipe":0},{"value1":"str(失效时间)","rules":"==","value2":"'None'","pipe":1}]

inputs.value: "update 用户账号对应表 set SESSION='失效{}',`失效时间` = '{}'where 用户账号='{}' ".format(SESSION,失效时间,用户账号)

inputs.name: template_string
inputs.value: 该失效SESSION仍然是失效状态，不更新失效时间

jspath.content: body > div:nth-child(15) > section:nth-child(1) > aside:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > span:nth-child(3) > span:nth-child(2)
body > div:nth-child(15) > section:nth-child(1) > aside:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > span:nth-child(3) > span:nth-child(2)

blocks.name: 条件分支
blocks.desc: 有失效时间的话（本身SESSION字段包含失效字眼）

inputs.name: ifcondition
inputs.value: [{"value1":"str(失效时间)","rules":"!=","value2":"''","pipe":1},{"value1":"str(失效时间)","rules":"!=","value2":"'null'","pipe":1},{"value1":"str(失效时间)","rules":"!=","value2":"'None'","pipe":1}]

blocks.name: 执行SQL语句
blocks.desc: 去掉失效字眼，去掉失效时间

inputs.name: sqlStr
inputs.value: "update 用户账号对应表 set SESSION='{}',`失效时间` = null where 用户账号='{}' ".format(SESSION,用户账号)
